since_last: 64% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.18%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -1.12% · Gold +0.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 64% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.18%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.18%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: POWL is the standout at +4.19%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +4.19%, BIDU +4.15%, BABA +3.86%, SKHY +3.42%, CEVA +2.71%. Laggards: EQIX -3.97%, PUBM -1.18%, NXE -1.14%, PLTR -1.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.22% at $125.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
